text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Here's the Yoitomake you requested! The jam
inside the roll cake makes it a bit tricky to eat,
but it's yummy and tastes just like Tomakomai. ♪

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I heard you wanted pickling containers, so...
Here, I got you a set in your lucky color. ♪ And
of course, I bought them in your lucky direction
too. ☆

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Dearie me, thank you both for the wonderful
gifts.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
This roll cake was so delicious the last time I tried
it, I just had to get another to share with my
dormmates.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
As for the containers, I figured that your luck
would be sure to bestow happiness on everyone
who eats the pickles.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Wait, so your present requests weren't for
yourself... but to make other people happy?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
That does sound just like you... But today, we
want to do something just for you, isn't that right,
Tarumae?

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you're always doing so much for us! There
must be something more... selfish you
want—anything at all!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Well, let's see... if you two insist, then, hmm... Oh,
I know just the thing!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
I made a batch of pickles yesterday, and I'd love
to see you munch on them and rave about how
delicious they are. ♪
